projects.name: ClaudioOS
projects.handoff_excerpt: RTL8168 wired-ethernet driver runs on real HW. Link up at 1000M, TX works, RX blocked. DHCP times out because chip fires zero RX interrupts. Next: read chip XID 0x40 + variant init. (HANDOFF unchanged since 2026-04-19.)
blockers: RTL8168 RX blocked — chip fires zero RX interrupts, DHCP times out

strategic_events.detail: exploitpipe Plan 1a delivered — foundation phase complete with race-fix, semgrepignore, and canonical-content follow-ups closed; Plan 1b spec written and committed (5792c4d). 19 commits today, 32 total on private remote since project inception yesterday.

Aether roadmap v4: +18 items witnessed today across two autonomous sessions → 141/196 (71%). Path B materially complete; cross-fn inlining + matmul auto-tune landed on Path A; 10 cross-cutting items across paths C/F + production hardening. 0 errors, all workspace tests green.

Antcolony Phase 1 sim foundation code-complete — all 5 cliff/cap fixes from the 2026-05-09 catastrophic-smoke postmortem are committed + food cap shipped; 144 unit tests pass. 2yr 10-species defensible-biology smoke is the validation gate, not yet launched.

The Right Wire — tweet rendering hardening session: 4 parser bugs + 1 UI behaviour gap fixed (long-form note-tweet truncation, replies/quotes parsing), 7 production deploys all Ready. OpenSky OAuth integration + dynamic queryId rotation handler also landed. CNC scraper redeployed clean at 793 tweets/run.

visionsystem Round 15.3 — code shipped to GitHub for the first time after history rewrite. Every prior push had 408'd silently at GitHub's 100 MB/file ceiling (origin/main empty across all attempts). Live r50 + 200-vec enrollment + top-5 matcher unchanged, supervisor pid 156328 still ticking.

moltbook-cli — full python-heartbeat → Rust port. Long-running python container retired entirely; single Rust binary 'mb' now drives posting + replying + monitoring from a 30-min systemd timer on cnc. Modules added: verify (lobster-math captcha solver), state, queue, plus more.

claudeai workbench — TP-Link rollback complete, cross-unit network restored. AC-1304 mesh fleet shelved for wipe-and-rebuild (planned: in-unit dumb-AP-with-mesh distribution, one node cabled to Sashawall LAN as wired uplink). Yesterday's 6% kokonoe→internet loss / 3% mesh hop loss / broken Discord-voice blocker resolved.

Incognito CAD Tool — v1.0 ship zip built and 109+ tests green. Data shows 104 distinct circle positions across 3 nested wrap-face regions, but Matt's last visual report ('still stacked') is unresolved — awaiting fresh screenshot or hover-coord readout to confirm cache-issue vs real rendering bug.
Job Hunter MCP orchestrator revived after 3-week pause — sniper-mode wait elapsed, Priyasha lead dead. 30-min poll + 2h scrape resumed, max 5-10/day hand-curated apps.

nightdrive — new project scaffolded. Autonomous synthwave / coding-chill audio + retrowave-visualizer video pipeline (composition → render → master → cover art → animated video → YouTube upload). Two revenue plays from one codebase: VOD channels + live RTMP stream.

exploitpipe — Plan 1b implementation plan started in writing-plans but never written to disk; two consecutive net hiccups interrupted. Resume by re-invoking writing-plans against the committed Plan 1b spec (5792c4d).

Incognito CAD Tool — stacked-circles .lbrn2 visual mismatch unresolved. Code-side data shows 104 distinct circle positions across 3 nested wrap-face regions; Matt's screen shows them still stacked. Blocked on customer-side artifact (fresh screenshot or hover-coord readout) before deeper investigation.
llm-wiki — 27k+ LOC bulk-ingest pass folded fresh HANDOFF content from across the fleet back into the wiki. Scale is content-snapshot, not refactoring.

notes: Massive ship day. Real (non-uploader) commits today: exploitpipe (19/7,949 LOC — Plan 1a delivered + Plan 1b spec), antcolony (11/1,020 — Phase 1 sim postmortem fixes + food cap), aether (7/4,193 — +18 roadmap items witnessed), moltbook-cli (2/4,894 — python→Rust port), incognito-cad (2/1,664 — v1.0 ship zip, stacked-lbrn2 mystery), llm-wiki (2/27,253 — bulk ingest), the right wire (2/1,282 — tweet parser hardening + OpenSky + queryId), claudeai (1/86 — TP-Link rollback), visionsystem (1/88 — first successful GitHub push via history rewrite), job-hunter (1/2 — HANDOFF revival edit), performancetracker (1/418 — schema/data routine work). The github-uploader pattern still creates a daily 'Initial commit' on most repos (CT=1, LT=2); those have been zeroed out in commits_today / lines_changed_today and recorded only when they reflect real activity. Two new projects added: moltbook-cli (existed but had no recent activity in prior reports), nightdrive (greenfield scaffold). Two NEW blockers added today: exploitpipe Plan 1b plan-on-disk gap + incognito-cad stacked-lbrn2 customer-side artifact wait. One blocker RESOLVED: claudeai cross-unit network degradation (TP-Link rollback). Health harvest intentionally omitted — handled on-device by iOS app via HealthKit. Client harvest skipped — no Gmail/Calendar connector on kokonoe.
